He's advocating for a fundamentally different paradigm, one rooted in diplomacy, equality, and the end of occupation. According to Green, the ongoing military campaigns are not only strategically ineffective but morally corrosive and politically instrumentalised. items.title: Sudan slams Berlin donor conference as ‘unacceptable’ as devastating war enters fourth year
items.summary: Sudan’s government on Wednesday slammed a donor conference hosted by Germany as “surprising and unacceptable”, saying the event meddles in the country’s internal affairs and was organised without consulting Khartoum. The conference is being held as the brutal war between the army and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) enters its fourth year.

items.title: Griezmann hopes to bid Atletico farewell in spectacular fashion
items.summary: Antoine Griezmann hopes to bid his beloved Atletico Madrid farewell in spectacular fashion after helping his team reach the first Champions League semi-finals in almost a decade. The record-breaking scorer is leaving the Spanish club at the end of this season to join Orlando City.

items.title: Ambassadors meet for historic talks in US amid deeply fraught Lebanon-Israel tensions
items.summary: Eve Irvine is pleased to welcome Simon Mabon, Professor of International Politics and Director of the Richardson Institute for Peace Studies at Lancaster University. He sees the current conflict between Lebanon and Israel as one defined more by layered, overlapping sovereignties. The talks between Israeli and Lebanese officials are, on the surface, historically significant. Yet they risk being misunderstood if treated as conventional diplomacy. The central issue is that Israel is not confronting

items.title: Champions League: PSG through to semis after defeating Liverpool
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Liverpool (2-0) thanks to a brace from Ousmane Dembélé and have reached the Champions League semi-finals for the third year running.

items.title: Kanye West pulls plug on Marseille concert, postpones until further notice
items.summary: US rapper Kanye West said on Tuesday he had postponed his show in Marseille, France’s second-largest city, until further notice. The 48-year-old, now known as Ye, said on X he made the decision after “much thought and consideration.” He had been due to perform on June 11.

items.title: Israeli strikes kill 10 in northern Gaza, including toddler, civil defence says
items.summary: Gaza’s civil defence agency said on Tuesday that 10 people, including a toddler, were killed in separate Israeli strikes in the north of the enclave. Violence has persisted despite an October 10 ceasefire. A strike on a police vehicle in Gaza City killed four people, including a child, and wounded others.

items.title: Middle East live: Trump says Iran talks may resume as Israel, Lebanon open direct track
items.summary: President Donald Trump said Tuesday that US-Iran peace talks could resume this week, while Israel and Lebanon agreed to launch direct negotiations, signaling movement on two key fronts in efforts to ease the Middle East conflict. The parallel diplomatic openings came even as violence persisted, underscoring both the fragility of the process and Washington's push to stabilise a region shaken by the over-six-week war. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

items.title: UN says Haiti powerful gang expansion halted but threat persists
items.summary: Anti-gang operations in Haiti have slowed the expansion of powerful armed groups in Port-au-Prince, a UN expert report said Tuesday, though progress remains uneven. Authorities, backed by drone strikes and self-defence groups, have curbed advances, but gangs continue adapting amid a prolonged security crisis in the country.

items.title: PSG beat Liverpool at Anfield to reach Champions League semi-finals
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Liverpool 2-0 at Anfield on Tuesday to reach the Champions League semi-finals with a 4-0 aggregate victory. Ousmane Dembele scored twice, netting in the 72nd minute and stoppage time. PSG, reigning European champions, will face Bayern Munich or Real Madrid next.

items.title: Florence Portelli (LR) : "À droite, il y a un discours inquiétant sur l'écologie"
items.summary: Le gouvernement recule sur le travail du 1er mai après la fronde des syndicats et de la gauche. Pour Florence Portelli, vice-présidente des Républicains et maire de Taverny (Val-d'Oise), ne pas pouvoir travailler le 1er mai est "une aberration". Sur la crise des carburants, elle estime qu'il faut des "énergies alternatives" et regrette que son parti ne s'empare pas du sujet de l'écologie. Il sera aussi question de la présidentielle de 2027 et de la victoire de Péter Magyar en Hongrie.

translation.title: Florence Portelli (LR): "On the right, there is a disturbing speech about ecology"
translation.summary: The government is back on 1 May after the sling of the unions and the left. For Florence Portelli, Vice-President of the Republicans and Mayor of Taverny (Val-d'Oise), not being able to work on 1 May is "an aberration". On the fuel crisis, she felt that "alternative energies" were needed and regretted that her party did not take over the subject of ecology. The presidential elections of 2027 and the victory of Péter Magyar in Hungary will also be discussed.

items.title: Ligue des champions : le PSG domine Liverpool et file en demi-finales
items.summary: Le Paris Saint-Germain a battu Liverpool (2-0) grâce à un doublé d'Ousmane Dembélé et se qualifie pour les demi-finales pour la 3e année consécutive.

translation.title: Champions League: PSG dominates Liverpool and runs in semifinals
translation.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Liverpool (2-0) with a double of Ousmane Dembélé and qualified for the semifinals for the third consecutive year.

items.title: Qu'est-ce que l'"Amoc" qui montre des signes d'affaiblissement ?
items.summary: Une nouvelle étude suggère que le courant océanique Amoc s’affaiblirait. Crucial à la régulation du climat et aux hivers doux en France, son effondrement aurait des effets « dévastateurs et irréversibles » pour de nombreux pays.

translation.title: What is "Amoc" showing signs of weakening?
translation.summary: A new study suggests that the ocean current Amoc would weaken. Crucial to climate regulation and mild winters in France, its collapse would have "destructive and irreversible" effects for many countries.

items.title: Haïti : bien que freinés, les gangs s'adaptent face aux opérations policières
items.summary: À Haïti, les forces de l’ordre ont réussi à ralentir l’expansion des gangs dans la capitale, selon un rapport de l'ONU, publié mardi. Mais la situation reste extrêmement précaire : ces groupes armés, dont les principaux chefs sont toujours libres, contrôlent encore une grande partie de Port-au-Prince, adaptent leurs stratégies dans un contexte de violence persistante marqué par enlèvements et attaques.

translation.title: Haiti: Although restrained, gangs adapt to police operations
translation.summary: In Haiti, the security forces managed to slow down gang expansion in the capital, according to a UN report, published Tuesday. But the situation remains extremely precarious: these armed groups, whose main leaders are still free, still control a large part of Port-au-Prince, adapt their strategies in a context of persistent violence marked by abductions and attacks.

items.title: Le rappeur américain Kanye West, visé pour des propos antisémites, reporte son concert à Marseille
items.summary: Kanye West a annoncé mardi le report de son concert prévu le 11 juin à Marseille, face à l'opposition des autorités de la ville et du gouvernement en raison de sorties antisémites et racistes.

translation.title: American rapper Kanye West, targeted for anti-Semitic comments, postponed his concert to Marseille
translation.summary: Kanye West announced on Tuesday the postponement of its concert scheduled for June 11 in Marseille, facing opposition from city and government authorities due to anti-Semitic and racist outings.

items.title: Au Soudan, le viol comme arme de guerre
items.summary: A la Une de la presse, ce mercredi 15 avril, la conférence sur le Soudan qui se tient aujourd’hui à Berlin à l’occasion du 3ème anniversaire du début du conflit. Le « divorce » entre Giorgia Meloni et Donald Trump, alors qu’émerge un improbable axe Meloni/Sanchez. Le Premier ministre espagnol, qui brille par sa singularité au sein de l’UE. Et la campagne pour un «été du sexe» au Royaume-Uni.

translation.title: In Sudan, rape as a weapon of war
translation.summary: On the front page of the press, this Wednesday, 15 April, the conference on Sudan which is held today in Berlin on the occasion of the 3rd anniversary of the beginning of the conflict. The "divorce" between Giorgia Meloni and Donald Trump, while emerging an unlikely Meloni/Sanchez axis. The Spanish Prime Minister, who shines by his singularity within the EU. And the campaign for a "sex summer" in the UK.

items.title: Blocus des ports iraniens : l'armée américaine annonce avoir refoulé six navires
items.summary: "Les forces américaines ont complètement mis à l'arrêt le commerce maritime" de l'Iran, revendique l'armée américaine qui a déclaré, mardi, avoir empêché six navires marchands de quitter les ports iraniens au cours des premières 24 heures du blocus imposé par les États-Unis à la République islamique. Lundi, au moins deux bâtiments en provenance d'Iran avaient franchi le détroit d'Ormuz.

translation.title: Blocks of Iranian ports: US Army announces to have returned six ships
translation.summary: "The US forces have completely stopped Iran's maritime trade," claims the US army, which declared on Tuesday that it had prevented six merchant ships from leaving Iranian ports during the first 24 hours of the US blockade on the Islamic Republic. On Monday, at least two buildings from Iran had crossed the Strait of Ormuz.

items.title: Moyen-Orient : Giorgia Meloni prend ses distances avec Israël et les États-Unis
items.summary: La Première ministre italienne a opéré un tournant dans sa politique étrangère, revenant sur les relations avec Israël et les États-Unis. "Lorsque nous ne sommes pas d'accord, et il arrive souvent de ne pas être d'accord, nous devons le dire" et "agir en conséquence", a dit Giorgia Meloni aux journalistes. "Compte tenu de la situation actuelle, le gouvernement a par exemple décidé de suspendre le renouvellement automatique de l'accord de défense avec Israël."

translation.title: Middle East: Giorgia Meloni distanced himself from Israel and the United States
translation.summary: The Italian Prime Minister has taken a turn in her foreign policy, returning to relations with Israel and the United States. "When we disagree, and it often happens that we disagree, we have to say so" and "act accordingly," said Giorgia Meloni to the journalists. "Given the current situation, for example, the government has decided to suspend the automatic renewal of the defence agreement with Israel."

items.title: Après trois ans de guerre au Soudan, des donateurs internationaux se réunissent à Berlin
items.summary: Trois ans après le début de la guerre entre armée et paramilitaires au Soudan, des donateurs se réunissent à Berlin mercredi pour tenter de relancer des négociations de paix et mobiliser une aide urgente face à une crise humanitaire que l'ONU qualifie de la plus grave au monde. Des rendez-vous similaires à Londres et Paris ces deux dernières années n'ont pas permis de percée diplomatique.

translation.title: After three years of war in Sudan, international donors meet in Berlin
translation.summary: Three years after the beginning of the war between the army and the paramilitary in the Sudan, donors gather in Berlin on Wednesday to try to relaunch peace negotiations and mobilize urgent assistance in the face of a humanitarian crisis that the United Nations calls the most serious in the world. Similar meetings in London and Paris over the past two years have not allowed for diplomatic breakthroughs.

items.title: Moyen-Orient en direct : Israël ne veut pas de la France dans les négociations avec le Liban
items.summary: À l'issue des pourparlers directs entre le Liban et Israël à Washington, Yechiel Leiter, l'ambassadeur israélien, a affirmé que Paris n'avait rien à faire dans les négociations. Quant aux discussions entre l'Iran et les États-Unis, dont une première session a échoué durant le week-end, elles pourraient reprendre prochainement à Islamabad. La guerre dans le Golfe est "presque finie", a assuré le président américain Donald Trump mardi soir sur Fox News. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Middle East live: Israel does not want France in negotiations with Lebanon
translation.summary: Following the direct talks between Lebanon and Israel in Washington, Yechiel Leiter, the Israeli ambassador, claimed that Paris had nothing to do with the negotiations. The discussions between Iran and the United States, whose first session failed during the weekend, could soon resume in Islamabad. The Gulf War is "almost over," said US President Donald Trump Tuesday night on Fox News. Follow our direct.

items.summary: Bringing the second day of this year's Coachella to a close, K-Pop girl group Blackpink made history Saturday night when they became the first Asian act to ever headline the festival. To a crowd of, reportedly, over 125,000 people, Jennie, Jisoo, Lisa and Rosé used the ground-breaking moment to pay homage to Korean heritage by arriving onstage in hanboks: a traditional type of dress.

items.summary: "Old Masters" such as Leonardo da Vinci, Sandro Botticelli and Rembrandt may have used proteins, especially egg yolk, in their oil paintings, according to a new study.

items.title: 镜观·足迹｜呵护千山万水 擘画永续发展
items.summary: 大美中国，江山如画。 党的十八大以来，习近平总书记的考察足迹遍及神州大地。祁连山麓、坝上林海，秦岭深处、黄河之滨，总书记在大江奔涌处谋划千秋大计，在山川锦绣间擘画生态蓝图。一系列重要论述，为新时代生态文明建设提供了根本遵循和行动指南。  世界环境日到来之际，我们跟随习近平总书记的脚步，一起呵护山水、寄情山水，领悟守护绿水青山、建设生态文明之道。  江河为脉 心系长江之变，习近平总书记前往沿江重镇，考察长江经济带发展。从三峡库区到洞庭湖畔，从港口码头到企业车间，总书记深入调研，作出一系列重要指示，为新时代江河保护治理提供了重要遵循。  2018年4月，习近平总书记来到湖南岳阳城陵矶水文站考察。在狭窄的站房外长廊上，习近平总书记举目远眺。“共抓大保护，不搞大开发”的战略定力，在这里化作守护一江碧水的坚定行动。  2023年10月10日下午，习近平总书记在江西九江市考察，冒雨在江边察看，了解当地长江国家文化公园建设、长江岸线生态修复等情况。10月12日，总书记在进一步推动长江经济带高质量发展座谈会上回顾长江经济带发展历程，感慨：“做就要做好，坚定做下去。笃行不怠，一以贯之，久久为功。” 黄河

items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”
items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

translation.title: Learn the handbooks.
translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. items.summary: 新华社合肥6月5日电 中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理刘国中3日至5日到安徽调研“三夏”农业生产工作。他强调，要深入学习贯彻习近平总书记关于国家粮食安全的重要论述，按照党中央、国务院部署，扛稳政治责任，毫不放松抓好夏收夏种夏管，全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收，全面打牢秋粮生产基础，确保完成全年粮食生产目标任务。 刘国中先后来到宿州市、淮南市、六安市，深入小麦机收和夏播现场、农机跨区作业服务点、农事服务中心、粮食仓储中心、地方农科院等，实地察看夏收夏种、农机作业服务保障、粮食烘干收储等工作，详细了解农作物新品种选育、大面积单产提升、农资保供稳价、高标准农田建设等情况。 刘国中强调，“三夏”工作抓得好不好，事关全年粮食生产目标任务能否顺利实现。当前正值“三夏”农业生产关键时期，要抓住有利天气抢晴收获，组织好农机跨区作业，强化服务保障和安全管理，确保夏收高效进行。要抓实抓牢机收减损、烘干晾晒等各项措施，最大程度减少粮食损失。要精心做好夏粮收购工作，引导各类企业积极入市，保障粮食市场平稳运行。要压茬推进夏播，加强农资供应和农事服务，强化技术集成及推广应用，落实落细合理密植、精量播种等大面积单产提升措施，

translation.title: Liu Guo-jung, during Anhui's research, stressed that he was doing his best to seize the harvest of summer grains, and to secure the production base of autumn grains.

Liu stressed that the success of the “Tsummer” exercise was a matter of success in achieving the annual food production target. Food losses should be minimized by the adoption of measures such as obscuring the machine for erosion and drying. It is important to ensure the smooth functioning of the food market by carefully preparing for the acquisition of food for the summer, and by directing the various enterprises to the market. items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

translation.title: Circular on the conduct of the Fourth National Agricultural Census issued by the State Council
translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 丁薛祥在山西调研时强调 守好公平公正“生命线” 确保实现“平安高考”目标
items.summary: 新华社太原6月5日电　6月3日至4日，中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理丁薛祥在山西调研高考组织保障和能源改革发展等工作。 　　丁薛祥首先前往山西省招生考试管理中心和太原市晋源区实验中学考点，听取高考工作情况汇报，实地察看考务组织各环节工作情况。他说，高考事关国计民生，关系千家万户切身利益。要认真学习贯彻习近平总书记重要指示精神，贯彻落实党中央和国务院决策部署，确保实现“平安高考”目标。考试招生制度改革和高考组织实施，都要始终牢记为党育人、为国选才，守好公平公正“生命线”。山西是第五批高考综合改革落地省份，要精心做好考务服务和综合保障工作，强化心理疏导和人文关怀，为莘莘学子营造良好考试环境。采取最严措施，加强试卷印制、运送、保管等全流程监管，严厉打击考试舞弊行为，严肃招生录取纪律，全力保证高考安全平稳顺利。 　　丁薛祥来到山西应用科技学院，调研民办高校发展情况。他表示，不管是公办大学还是民办大学，都是党办的大学。要把党的领导全面融入学校治理体系，强化思想政治引领，统一思政课要求和标准，把立德树人根本任务落到实处。适应产业升级新形势，在培养高技能人才的同时，注重培养经济社会发展需要的各类人

(b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.

items.title: 'Guerra esquecida' no Sudão chega a 3 anos com dezenas de milhares de mortos e catástrofe humanitária
items.summary:
A guerra no Sudão, que completa três anos nesta quarta-feira (15), aprofunda-se como uma das crises mais graves -e, paradoxalmente, negligenciadas- de todo o mundo. O conflito é marcado pela violência desenfreada contra civis, destruição sistemática da infraestrutura e colapso generalizado dos serviços essenciais. E nos últimos meses, com a incorporação dos drones, vem se tornando ainda mais mortal.
